name: Contest Memory Ribbon (Blue)
how_to_obtain: Transferred to a game that doesn't support Gen III contests; records past Gen III contest wins

name: Contest Memory Ribbon (Gold)
how_to_obtain: Awarded when a Pokemon has all 20 Gen III contest ribbons and is transferred forward

name: Artist Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Master Rank Cool contest and have your Pokemon's picture taken in Ruby, Sapphire, or Emerald

name: Coolness Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Master Rank Cool contest in Omega Ruby, Alpha Sapphire, or Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl

name: Beauty Master Ribbon (Contest)
how_to_obtain: Win the Master Rank Beauty contest in Omega Ruby, Alpha Sapphire, or Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl

name: Cuteness Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Master Rank Cute contest in Omega Ruby, Alpha Sapphire, or Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl

name: Cleverness Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Master Rank Smart contest in Omega Ruby, Alpha Sapphire, or Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl

name: Toughness Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Master Rank Tough contest in Omega Ruby, Alpha Sapphire, or Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl

name: Contest Star Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win a contest in Scarlet or Violet

name: Twinkling Star Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win all contest categories in Scarlet or Violet

name: Winning Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Lv. 50) in Ruby, Sapphire, or Emerald

name: Victory Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Lv. 100) in Ruby, Sapphire, or Emerald, or win in Colosseum or XD

name: Ability Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Single, Lv. 50) in Emerald, Colosseum, or XD

name: Great Ability Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Single, Lv. 100) in Emerald, Colosseum, or XD

name: Double Ability Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Double, Lv. 50) in Emerald, Colosseum, or XD

name: Multi Ability Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Multi, Lv. 50) in Emerald, Colosseum, or XD

name: Pair Ability Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower (Link Multi, Lv. 50) in Emerald, Colosseum, or XD

name: Battle Memory Ribbon (Blue)
how_to_obtain: Transferred to a game that doesn't support Gen III battle facilities; records past battle wins

name: Battle Memory Ribbon (Gold)
how_to_obtain: Awarded when a Pokemon has all 7 Gen III battle facility ribbons and is transferred forward

name: Skilful Battler Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win 20 consecutive battles in the Battle Tree in Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, or Ultra Moon

name: Expert Battler Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win 50 consecutive battles in the Battle Tree in Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, or Ultra Moon

name: Battle Royal Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win 50 consecutive Battle Royal battles in Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, or Ultra Moon

name: Battle Tree Great Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Defeat a Battle Legend in the Battle Tree in Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, or Ultra Moon

name: Battle Tree Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Defeat all Battle Legends in the Battle Tree in Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, or Ultra Moon

name: Tower Master Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Win the Battle Tower in Sword or Shield

name: Alert Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained from an in-game NPC for a memorable event in Colosseum or XD

name: Shock Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained from an in-game NPC for a memorable event in Colosseum or XD

name: Downcast Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained from an in-game NPC for a memorable event in Colosseum or XD

name: Smile Ribbon

name: Gorgeous Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Buy from a vendor for 10,000 Poke in Diamond, Pearl, or Platinum

name: Royal Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Buy from a vendor for 100,000 Poke in Diamond, Pearl, or Platinum

name: Gorgeous Royal Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Buy from a vendor for 999,999 Poke in Diamond, Pearl, or Platinum

name: Footprint Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Raise a Pokemon's friendship to max and show it to the Footprint Man in Diamond, Pearl, Platinum, or HeartGold/SoulSilver

name: Effort Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Max out a Pokemon's Effort Values (510 EVs total) and show it to a specific NPC

name: Best Friends Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Max out a Pokemon's friendship and show it to a specific NPC (Gen 6+)

name: Training Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Max out a Pokemon's base stats through Super Training or Hyper Training (Gen 6+)

name: Legend Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained from a special in-game event for legendary Pokemon in Omega Ruby, Alpha Sapphire, Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, or Ultra Moon

name: Master Rank Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Reach Master Rank in the Battle Stadium in Sword, Shield, Scarlet, or Violet

name: Hisui Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained from a research task in Pokemon Legends: Arceus

name: Once-in-a-Lifetime Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained from a special event in Scarlet or Violet

name: Partner Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Obtained in Pokemon Legends: Arceus for bonding with your starter partner

name: National Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Purify all Shadow Pokemon in Colosseum

name: Earth Ribbon
how_to_obtain: Defeat Mt. Battle (100 consecutive battles) in Colosseum or XD
